corrections.text: The article states that Liz Klein 'called it reckless, expensive, and irresponsible.' The phrase 'reckless, expensive, and irresponsible' was spoken by an Interior Department spokesperson (as quoted in Utility Dive), not by Klein. Klein described the arrangement as 'illegal' with 'no legal basis' — language the article correctly quotes in the same sentence. The Interior Department spokesperson's characterization of offshore wind projects was misattributed to Klein, a critic of the administration's buyout program.
